assignments.description: Builds field values for the selected relationship object and role. The assigned values are used later by record create steps.
assignments.name: Assign_Record_Variables_for_Individual_Affiliation
assignments.label: Assign Record Variables for Individual Affiliation

assignments.description: Builds field values for the selected relationship object and role. The assigned values are used later by record create steps.
assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Assign_Record_Variables_for_Individual_Affiliation
assignments.label: Assign Record Variables for Individual Affiliation

decisions.description: Determines the target record path based on selected account and relationship context. The branch is used later to populate and create the correct relationship object.
decisions.name: Account_Individual_or_Group
decisions.label: Account - Individual or Group

decisions.description: If the record wasn't found, it does a create records otherwise it does an update record.
decisions.name: Create_or_Update
decisions.label: Create or Update

decisions.description: Determines the target record path based on selected account and relationship context. The branch is used later to populate and create the correct relationship object.
decisions.name: Household_or_Organization
decisions.label: Household or Organization?

decisions.description: Determines the target record path based on selected account and relationship context. The branch is used later to populate and create the correct relationship object.
decisions.name: What_type_of_record_to_create
decisions.label: What type of record to create?

Flow.description: Guides users through creating relationships or affiliations by selecting person, organization, and role paths. Decisions and assigned values are used later to create AccountContactRelation, ContactContactRelation, or AccountAccountRelation records.
Flow.label: SMQS Screen Create Relationship or Affiliation

loops.name: Filter_Lookup_from_Collection_to_Single
loops.label: Filter Lookup from Collection to Single

recordCreates.description: Creates the selected relationship record type (AccountContactRelation, ContactContactRelation, or AccountAccountRelation). Created records are used later for user confirmation and related automation.
recordCreates.name: Create_Individual_Relationship
recordCreates.label: Create Individual Relationship

recordCreates.description: Creates the selected relationship record type (AccountContactRelation, ContactContactRelation, or AccountAccountRelation). Created records are used later for user confirmation and related automation.
recordCreates.name: Create_Organization_Member_ACR
recordCreates.label: Create Organization Member ACR

recordCreates.description: Creates the selected relationship record type (AccountContactRelation, ContactContactRelation, or AccountAccountRelation). Created records are used later for user confirmation and related automation.
recordCreates.name: Create_Organizational_Affiliation
recordCreates.label: Create Organizational Affiliation

recordUpdates.description: Updates an existing AccountContactRelation with the values entered on the screen. Filtered by the Id found in Find_Existing_ACR to avoid REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING on AccountId/ContactId.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Organization_Member_ACR
recordUpdates.label: Update Organization Member ACR

recordLookups.description: Since there is only one ACR per group and a person, this looks up the existing one to prevent an error and makes the screen after an update action instead of create.
recordLookups.name: Find_Existing_ACR
recordLookups.label: Find Existing ACR

recordLookups.description: Retrieves Account or Contact records needed for relationship creation. Retrieved ids are used later when assigning fields for create steps.
recordLookups.name: Get_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordLookups.description: Retrieves Account or Contact records needed for relationship creation. Retrieved ids are used later when assigning fields for create steps.
recordLookups.name: Get_Contact_From_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Contact From Account

recordLookups.description: Retrieves Account or Contact records needed for relationship creation. Retrieved ids are used later when assigning fields for create steps.
recordLookups.name: Get_Contact_From_Related_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Contact From Related Account

recordLookups.description: Retrieves Account or Contact records needed for relationship creation. Retrieved ids are used later when assigning fields for create steps.
recordLookups.name: Get_Related_Account_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Related Account Record

fields.name: ACR_Org_Roles
fields.fieldText: What is the individuals role in the organization?

fields.name: ContactContact_DisplayText
fields.fieldText:
You are creating a relationship between two individuals, {!Get_Account.Name} and {!Get_Related_Account_Record.Name}.


What is {!Get_Account.Name}'s relationship to {!Get_Related_Account_Record.Name}?

screens.description: Captures whether the user is creating an individual relationship, household relationship, or organizational affiliation. The choice is used later to route through the correct decision path.
screens.name: Create_Affiliation_or_Relationship
screens.label: Create Affiliation or Relationship

screens.description: Creates the selected relationship record type (AccountContactRelation, ContactContactRelation, or AccountAccountRelation). Created records are used later for user confirmation and related automation.
screens.name: Create_Organization_Affilation
screens.label: Create Organization Affilation

fields.name: AccountAccount_DisplayText
fields.fieldText:
You are creating an affiliation between two organizations, {!Get_Account.Name} and {!Get_Related_Account_Record.Name}.


What is {!Get_Account.Name}'s affiliation to {!Get_Related_Account_Record.Name}?
